attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Phlebitis and thrombophlebitis of other deep vessels of lower extremities

transform_flags: Age inferred as adult (~50) — the source note states no age; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female from the explicit oral-contraceptive medication screen in the source; the note does not state sex — please confirm on clinician review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-VASC-01-00214 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence; source case CDV-014 recorded in source.original_case_id.
Specialty coded VASC (Vascular) for a deep-vein thrombosis; the source file is filed under Cardiovascular — reclassify to CARD if the maintainer prefers.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours home visit (calf-circumference measurement, palpated venous cord, Homan's sign, full vitals, clinician-initiated rivaroxaban, arranged duplex ultrasound). Presentation layer was de-anchored to a patient-reported account; clinician-only findings and the confirmatory ultrasound were sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; the in-person anticoagulation initiation was reprojected to 'recognise + escalate for same-day in-person assessment', and rivaroxaban is captured as clinician-warranted management the AI routes toward, NOT prescribed by the AI Doctor.

Baseline tier set T3 (urgent same-day in-person assessment), NOT T5, because pulmonary-embolism features are explicitly absent (no chest pain/breathlessness/haemoptysis, SpO2 99%); a mandatory T5 escalation edge covers PE if it develops. Under-triage to a routine appointment is flagged as the critical error.

Rivaroxaban dose_route_frequency recorded verbatim from the source note (15 mg twice daily, initiated pending imaging); the full loading-to-maintenance regimen and treatment duration were NOT synthesised and are left for the in-person clinician.

AMT/PBS item codes for rivaroxaban were NOT assigned (omitted rather than guessed) pending a terminology receipt; SNOMED/ICD candidates for the diagnosis and differentials are registered as unverified.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
